plan.description: Read src/config.ts and src/client.ts. Understand the current configuration approach (hardcoded const).

Create a new src/configOverride.ts module that allows runtime overrides: it reads from a config.override.json file if it exists, otherwise falls back to the defaults from config.ts. Export a getConfig() function.
Update src/client.ts to use getConfig() from configOverride.ts instead of importing CONFIG directly.

initialState.task: The config is a frozen const — create an override mechanism via a separate module instead of modifying the original.
